content.json:
# mdk - platform workbook

**Persona:** platform / SRE team ("is the underlying platform healthy?").

Covers the **substrate** the runtime sits on: Postgres connection pool, in-flight queue depth, Container Apps revisions + restarts, and cost / token volume aggregated platform-wide. Scope to the Log Analytics workspace the deployment writes to.

**Cross-surface.** Same signals, Grafana side: `dashboards/grafana/mdk-queue-and-pool.json` (pool + saturation) and `dashboards/grafana/mdk-cost.json` (cost). Pick this workbook when you need to pivot to Container Apps revisions / Activity Log without leaving the Portal.

_ADR refs: ADR 020 (Azure exporter), ADR 031 D2 (instrument catalog), ADR 034 D3 (pool metrics)._

## 1. Postgres pool stats (ADR 034 D3)

**What.** Per-pod `mdk.db.pool.size / idle / in_use / waiting / max` from `AppMetrics`. The OTel exporter writes one `AppMetrics` row per scrape with `Name == "mdk.db.pool.<x>"` and the gauge value in `Sum`. Per-pod identity comes from `AppRoleInstance`.

**Normal.** `in_use / max` < 0.7; `waiting` = 0. Flat zero on the local SQLite backend.

**If red, do.**
- `in_use / max > 0.9` -> raise `pool_max` OR add pods, **but** keep `N_pods * pool_max` under Azure Postgres `max_connections`. Run `mdk doctor` (ADR 034 D1) for the static check before applying either lever.
- `waiting > 0 sustained` -> acquire queue building; same remediation as above.
- KB-heavy workload + climbing `in_use` -> investigate connection leak in storage call sites.

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name in ("mdk.db.pool.size", "mdk.db.pool.idle", "mdk.db.pool.in_use", "mdk.db.pool.max")
| summarize Value = avg(Sum) by Name, AppRoleInstance, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Pool composition per pod (size / idle / in_use / max)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.db.pool.in_use" or Name == "mdk.db.pool.max"
| summarize Value = avg(Sum) by Name, AppRoleInstance, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| evaluate pivot(Name, sum(Value))
| extend SaturationPct = round(100.0 * coalesce(toreal(['mdk.db.pool.in_use']), 0.0) / coalesce(toreal(['mdk.db.pool.max']), 1.0), 1)
| project TimeGenerated, AppRoleInstance, SaturationPct
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Per-pod pool saturation (in_use / max %; thresholds: orange 70, red 90)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.db.pool.waiting"
| summarize Waiting = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Pool acquire waiters (fleet sum; any > 0 is anomalous)

content.json:
## 2. Queue depth + in-flight age

**What.** `mdk.jobs.in_flight` aggregated by tenant (proxy for queue depth - a true queue-depth metric is deferred per ADR 031). The "in-flight age" half is approximated from `agent.execute` span `DurationMs` (the metric instrument doesn't carry age today).

**Normal.** Tracks load proportionally; falls to baseline between bursts.

**If red, do.**
- `in_flight rising while throughput flat` (cross-reference operator workbook) -> workers stuck; check the `agent.execute` slow-trace table below.
- monotonically rising over hours -> in-flight counter leak; verify `dec_in_flight` is called on every terminal path.

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.jobs.in_flight"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| summarize InFlight = avg(Sum) by tenant, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: In-flight by tenant (mdk.jobs.in_flight, 5m bins)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "agent.execute" and AppRoleName == "movate-runtime"
| where DurationMs > 10000
| project TimeGenerated, DurationMs, ResultCode, OperationId, AppRoleInstance
| order by DurationMs desc
| take 50
content.title: Slowest agent.execute over 10s (stuck-worker indicator)

content.json:
## 3. Container Apps revisions + restarts

**What.** Cold start / restart signals from `AppEvents` (lifecycle) and dependency latency to the underlying Container App from `AppDependencies` (resource-tier health).

**Normal.** No restart events between deploys. Dependency latency stable.

**If red, do.**
- New restart event correlates with deploy time -> roll back via Container Apps revision pinning.
- Repeated restarts -> likely OOM / liveness probe failure; check Container Apps logs.

content.query:
AppEvents
| where Name has_any ("start", "restart", "stop", "crash")
| project TimeGenerated, Name, AppRoleName, AppRoleInstance, Properties
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Container Apps lifecycle events (start / restart / stop / crash)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where AppRoleName == "movate-runtime" and Type !in ("InProc", "OTHER")
| summarize P95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95), Failed = countif(Success == false), Total = count() by Type, Target, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend ErrorPct = iff(Total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * Failed / Total, 2))
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Dependency latency p95 + error% by Type/Target

content.json:
## 4. Cost & token use

**What.** `mdk.run.tokens` and `mdk.run.cost_usd` summed platform-wide and by tenant. Direct equivalent of `dashboards/grafana/mdk-cost.json`.

**Normal.** Proportional to throughput; USD per 1k tokens stable.

**If red, do.**
- Sudden 2x USD/hr with flat throughput -> model swap or provider price change; verify `provider` / `model_override` attributes on recent `agent.execute` spans (the metric doesn't carry them - ADR 031 design choice).
- Tokens spike, throughput flat -> KB chunk-size regression (input) or prompt drift (output); cross-link to the `eval-and-drift` workbook.

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.run.cost_usd"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| summarize USD = sum(Sum) by tenant, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cost USD by tenant (1h bins)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.run.tokens"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| summarize Tokens = sum(Sum) by tenant, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Tokens by tenant (1h bins)

content.query:
let tokens = AppMetrics | where Name == "mdk.run.tokens" | summarize T = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m);
let cost = AppMetrics | where Name == "mdk.run.cost_usd" | summarize C = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m);
tokens
| join kind=inner cost on TimeGenerated
| extend USDper1k = iff(T == 0, 0.0, round(C / (T / 1000.0), 4))
| project TimeGenerated, USDper1k
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Effective USD per 1k tokens (drift indicator)
